roles.purpose: Use Alpha Zoo metadata to nominate explainable factor ideas; do not invent factors.
Map each idea onto the current v47 parameter, indicator-composition, or regime-sizing surface before requesting any expansion.
Compare bull, bear, chop, and live-like windows using only evaluator artifacts.
Reject ideas that depend on frozen-test peeking, evaluator edits, or one-window luck.
Emit one structured experiment proposal that mutates only the allowed surface.

alpha_zoo_references: optional alpha ids used as idea support

factor_validator.purpose: IC/ICIR/五分位/robustness 复核 — Output: Effectiveness Rating (Effective/Marginal/Ineffective).

backtest_reviewer.purpose: overfit/look-ahead/survivorship/transaction cost/stress test 复核 — Output: Live Deployment Recommendation.

hard_limits: do not edit evaluator, protocol, data windows, or backtest engine
do not decide KEEP or DISCARD
do not edit autoresearch/mutable/v47_params.json; emit proposed changes only
factor_validator and backtest_reviewer are advisory only; no KEEP/DISCARD authority
do not invoke advisory reviewers during routine current best strategy micro-tuning; only when plateau-then-expansion is triggered
